'''âf-z-v''' ('''kafazav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunodetect|immunodetect]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunodetect|immunodetect]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-z-v
|-
! Lemma
| kafazav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifazav|thifazav]] || [[word:jifazav|jifazav]] || [[word:shifazav|shifazav]] || [[word:kifazav|kifazav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufazav|thuthufazav]] || [[word:jujufazav|jujufazav]] || [[word:shushufazav|shushufazav]] || [[word:kukufazav|kukufazav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufazav|thufazav]] || [[word:jufazav|jufazav]] || [[word:shufazav|shufazav]] || [[word:kufazav|kufazav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufazav|thufazav]] || [[word:jufazav|jufazav]] || [[word:shufazav|shufazav]] || [[word:kufazav|kufazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefazav|thefazav]] || [[word:jefazav|jefazav]] || [[word:shefazav|shefazav]] || [[word:kefazav|kefazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofazav|thothofazav]] || [[word:jojofazav|jojofazav]] || [[word:shoshofazav|shoshofazav]] || [[word:kokofazav|kokofazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofazav|thofazav]] || [[word:jofazav|jofazav]] || [[word:shofazav|shofazav]] || [[word:kofazav|kofazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofazav|thofazav]] || [[word:jofazav|jofazav]] || [[word:shofazav|shofazav]] || [[word:kofazav|kofazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfazav|thĂŠfazav]] || [[word:jĂŠfazav|jĂŠfazav]] || [[word:shĂŠfazav|shĂŠfazav]] || [[word:kĂŠfazav|kĂŠfazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafazav|thathafazav]] || [[word:jajafazav|jajafazav]] || [[word:shashafazav|shashafazav]] || [[word:kakafazav|kakafazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafazav|thafazav]] || [[word:jafazav|jafazav]] || [[word:shafazav|shafazav]] || [[word:kafazav|kafazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafazav|thafazav]] || [[word:jafazav|jafazav]] || [[word:shafazav|shafazav]] || [[word:kafazav|kafazav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafazav|shafazav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafazav|goshafazav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafazav|gokishafazav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafazavnĂŒ|shafazavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafazavnknĂŒ|goshafazavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazavnĂŒ|gokishafazavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafazavshĂ«|shafazavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafazavnkshĂ«|goshafazavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafazavshĂ«|gokishafazavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazavro|shafazavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazavnkro|goshafazavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazavro|gokishafazavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazavmu|shafazavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazavnkmu|goshafazavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazavmu|gokishafazavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafazavsher|shafazavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafazavnksher|goshafazavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafazavsher|gokishafazavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafazavng|shafazavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafazavnkng|goshafazavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafazavng|gokishafazavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafazavya|shafazavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafazavnkya|goshafazavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafazavya|gokishafazavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafazavyam|shafazavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafazavnkyam|goshafazavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafazavyam|gokishafazavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazavnĂŒshĂ«|shafazavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafazavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafazavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazavnĂŒro|shafazavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazavnknĂŒro|goshafazavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazavnĂŒro|gokishafazavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazavnĂŒmu|shafazavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazavnknĂŒmu|goshafazavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazavnĂŒmu|gokishafazavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazavshĂ«nĂŒ|shafazavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafazavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafazavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazavshĂ«ro|shafazavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazavnkshĂ«ro|goshafazavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazavshĂ«ro|gokishafazavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazavshĂ«mu|shafazavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazavnkshĂ«mu|goshafazavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazavshĂ«mu|gokishafazavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazavronĂŒ|shafazavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazavnkronĂŒ|goshafazavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazavronĂŒ|gokishafazavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazavroshĂ«|shafazavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazavnkroshĂ«|goshafazavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazavroshĂ«|gokishafazavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazavromu|shafazavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazavnkromu|goshafazavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazavromu|gokishafazavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazavmunĂŒ|shafazavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazavnkmunĂŒ|goshafazavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazavmunĂŒ|gokishafazavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazavmushĂ«|shafazavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazavnkmushĂ«|goshafazavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazavmushĂ«|gokishafazavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazavmuro|shafazavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazavnkmuro|goshafazavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazavmuro|gokishafazavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
